# @platform/platform-runtime-context

Typed runtime context carrier (requestId, traceId, spanId, actorId, tenantId). Zero @platform dependencies. Flows BFF -> use case -> adapter.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/platform-runtime-context
Version: 0.1.0
Component: platform-runtime-context
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: observability-core
Owner: team-platform
```

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: platform
Class: experimental.platform
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define RuntimeContext interface with requestId, traceId, spanId, actorId, tenantId, correlationId, featureName, operationName
- Provide createContext and createRequestContext factory helpers
- Export types importable by React feature packages for requestId propagation

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not import or wrap any @platform package
- Does not implement tracing or logging
- Does not expose HTTP request objects

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Import from @platform/platform-runtime-context — public exports only
